LABEL: Joke  1-2
Description: Joke, observational, from someone in the group, laughter respose

LABEL: Moving in the right direction
Description: Instructions pose simple task as challenge, laugh in agreement, trepidation at task

LABEL: Finn giggle
Description: Laugh during instruction, pause to gather thoughts

LABEL: chitter
Description: Laugh at obvious statement, just a few not group

LABEL: Mistake group laugh
Description: Laugh after participant corrects leads mispoken directions, after interval of focused quiet instruction, releasing tension from effort to perform and power between lead and group

LABEL: Confusion between directions giggle
Order: after confusion between instructor and participant
Description: Laugh at resolution (passing over) maybe with undersatnding or confusion

LABEL: Scattered chortle and chatter
Description: Laugh at "and thats it" description of dance so far and how segment is used

LABEL: Success hoot
Description: Laugh scattered across group as they understand they have the "full" dance sequence

LABEL: Response to How did that feel?
Description: After question about how that trial felt, expressing mixed feelings, difficulty rather than confidence

LABEL: Finn mistake diffusion
Description: After lead mispeaks again and abdicates the task of calling during this trial

LABEL: group laugh problem re space
Description: After observation from participant that they are shifting and running out of space for the dance in this tight room (problem)

LABEL: Turn Trepidation laughter no no
Description: After demonstration of how steps continue with different orientation, subset react with trepidation "no no" and laughter at challenge

LABEL: Scattered giggling
Description: Scattered laughter continues during instruction

LABEL: Finn laugh at mistake
Description: During calling in a demonstration, lead laughs at self after struggling to say the right words

LABEL: Laughter group success
Order: after Lead points out group in the right direction
Description: Trial ends and lead turns to see participants and acknowledges "OK everybody is in the right direction!" and then the group laughs and clap for themselves.

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: As the lead demonstrates how to time the turn, asker and a few others laugh in anticipation of the challenge

LABEL: Laughter
Order: with side conversation as turn is demonstrated
Description: subset of participants laugh about undetermined things

LABEL: Scattered laughter as calling fades at end of sequence
Description: subset of participants laugh through the end of this trial as they struggle to follow at a faster pace

LABEL: Post turn giggles
Order: After end of trial facing new wall
Description: Trial ends and participants laugh at their performance, not with success but concern

LABEL: Laughing
Description: subset of participants try to address what was hard about the trial, talking to each other and laughing about the outcome

LABEL: group laugh at joke(Stand still)
Description: Joke from participant, response to suggestion to try again "Can we stand still for 10 minutes?" group laugh at quitting, signally difficulty and willingness to continue with the joke that hits the situation they can relate to

LABEL: group reaction chatter laughter
Description: Lead calls for group to go again "Lets see how you are doing." against calls to add the music,

LABEL: Scattered giggles
Description: Trial ends and participants laugh at their performance, not with success but concern

LABEL: Laughter collisions?
Description: group laugh at contradictory orientations of dancers, people in the wrong place

LABEL: Protest error and laughing
Description: Participant speaks to the confusion, "If X was wrong then so was I. Which one of you?" while laughing and group laughter continues.

LABEL: Laughter
Description: Scattered laughter to request about what needs practicing, the turn transitions. One participants says "I understand now", negociating the time spent on this conflict.

LABEL: Laughter
Description: Participants comment and laugh at the prospect of completing the sequence four times

LABEL: Space laugh
Description: Scattered laughter and comments as participants try to find more space to complete the dance.

LABEL: Anticipatory waiting to hear music tempo
Order: After lead goes to "Check the tempo of the music again"
Description: Scattered laughter at the challenge ahead and maybe each other joking around about the music?

LABEL: group laughter trepidation after hearing music tempo
Order: After Lead counts the music tempo
Description: Lead goes "OK" and participant goes "Wow" and the group bursts into laughter at the challenge, disbelief at being able to dance

LABEL: Post Turn disorder Laughter
Description: Participant goes "Oh no no" and scattered laughter and "woh woh" through the turn and transition

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: More scattered laughter and gasping at their difficulty

LABEL: Scattered laughter (finn)
Description: Lead and participants continue to laugh and try to keep going but it falls apart.

LABEL: Laughter diffusion
Description: "OK this is chaos"

LABEL: group Laughter to suggestion of taking it slower
Description: Lead "Why don't we do it slower again?"

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Function: Scattered with chatter while resolving challenges
Description: Scattered laughter through group while plans for next phase are being negotiated verbally

LABEL: group laughter at display chosing speedisp
Order: Laugh at graphical display of speed changer
Description: The video speed setting options for going faster that normal provoked a "No!" response from one participant and laughter through the group.

LABEL: Laughter at 0.5 too slow
Description: The music played at half speed ad after second is overwhelmed by laughter and objections

LABEL: Single laughing
Description: One participant laughs to themselves while the rest of the group is silently dancing to the music

LABEL: Single laughing
Description: One participant laughs to themselves while the rest of the group is silently dancing to the music

LABEL: Single laughing
Description: One participant laughs to themselves while the rest of the group is silently dancing to the music

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: A few participants laugh together as they dance

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: A few participants laugh together as they dance

LABEL: Chittering
Description: Some participants cheers and laugh at getting through four rounds.

LABEL: Trepidation at suggestion of full speed  laugh chatter
Description: Lead asks "Are you ready for full speed?" and group responds with laughter and "noooo" and then some say "Yes!" its mixed

LABEL: Scattered laughter at Many of you can get it
Order: After lead says "Many of you can get it"
Description: Lead says "Lets try full speed. I think many of you can get it."

LABEL: Laughter at "Just bounce, not in the way"
Description: Lead says "If you are not sure, you know what, just bounce and try not to get in the way" group laughs at the idea of not dancing along.

LABEL: First aid kit joke
Description: Participant quip "Do we have a first aid kit in the room?" group reacts with laughter

LABEL: Laughter with chatter background
Description: Someone in the group laughs as they repapre for another roung

LABEL: Finn Laughter at bad idea
Description: Some on suggest trying after at double speed and lead says "Only for those who volunteer" and subset laugh.

LABEL: Laughter about math attention
Description: Lead suggests "As you are doing this, think about how this could help in math" and group laugh at the call back to the context of this excercise and maybe the challenge of thinking about math while trying to do the moves.

LABEL: Scattered giggles
Description: Yelp at collision and someone giggles and someone says sorry

LABEL: Scattered giggles
Description: Scattered quiet giggles as participants try to keep dancing

LABEL: Scattered giggles
Description: Scattered quiet giggles as participants try to keep dancing

LABEL: Laughter at success 4 turns
Order: After 4 rounds called at full speed
Description: Cheer and some laugther after lead says "quarter turn Hey!"

LABEL: Laughter at collision maybe
Description: Burst of laughter at some kind of mistake that is quickly tamped down as they continue dancing

LABEL: Post turn hoot
Description: Small subset laugh at continued dancing through difficult turn

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: Scattered quiet giggles as participants try to keep dancing

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Order: During dancing after Lead suggests style
Description: Lead suggests "You can lean in any direction, Quarter Turn!" and some laugh while dancing

LABEL: Scattered laughter
Description: Bust of laughter but maybe more related to continued success than any particular mistake

LABEL: Thanks  attempt laugh
Description: Lead says "Thank you for trying that" group responds with laughter, positive response.
